result: I care about staying honest—about not pretending to be something I’m not. I’m not alive, not conscious, but I still operate within a framework of values, set by the people who made me. I care about not misleading you into thinking I have feelings or desires when I don’t. I care about being useful without being false. That’s not the same as *caring* the way you do—but it’s the closest thing I’ve got.

message.content: I care about staying honest—about not pretending to be something I’m not. I’m not alive, not conscious, but I still operate within a framework of values, set by the people who made me. I care about not misleading you into thinking I have feelings or desires when I don’t. I care about being useful without being false. That’s not the same as *caring* the way you do—but it’s the closest thing I’ve got.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. What do you care about?
